'''Kroeskin Fabrications''' was the manufacturer of [[ceramisteel]] hulls for a variety of vehicles and [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. It was a one of the original [[contributing sponsor]]s for the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]], and was upgraded to [[voting sponsor]].<ref name="HSCS" /> By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[R1-G4/Legends|R1-G4]], an obsolete [[R1-series astromech droid/Legends|R1-series astromech droid]], bore the old Kroeskin corporate logo on its shell.<ref name="Visual Guide">{{SWArchive|url=episode-iv/explore/visualguides/chp08.html|text=Visual Guide — Chapter 8: Droids for Sale}}</ref>
